task: Compare the breeds Afghan Hound, Akita and Azawakh.
graderReasoning: The agent successfully reached the AKC Compare Breeds tool, selected Afghan Hound, Akita, and Azawakh (confirmed by page state showing those three selected), opened the comparison results, and extracted the comparison data. The final response matches the visible AKC comparison results shown in the trajectory, including personality, popularity ranking, group, size, height, weight, life expectancy, child/dog compatibility, trainability, coat length, grooming, shedding, activity level, and barking.
final_result_response:
I compared Afghan Hound, Akita, and Azawakh on AKC.

| Attribute | Afghan Hound | Akita | Azawakh |
|---|---|---|---|
| Personality | Independent, sweet | Dignified, courageous, profoundly loyal | Independent, loyal, deeply affectionate |
| Popularity | 117th | 62nd | 195th |
| Group | Hound Group | Working Group | Hound Group |
| Size | Large | XLarge | Large |
| Height | 25-27 in | 26-28 in male, 24-26 in female | 25-29 in male, 23.5-27.5 in female |
| Weight | 50-60 lb | 100-130 lb male, 70-100 lb female | 44-55 lb male, 33-44 lb female |
| Life Expectancy | 12-18 years | 10-14 years | 12-15 years |
| Good with Children | Better with supervision | Better with supervision | Better with supervision |
| Good with Dogs | With supervision | Not recommended | With supervision |
| Trainability | May be stubborn | Agreeable | Independent |
| Coat | Long | Medium | Short |
| Grooming | Daily brushing | 2-3 times/week brushing | Weekly brushing |
| Shedding | Infrequent | Seasonal | Occasional |
| Activity Level | Energetic | Energetic | Regular exercise |
| Barking | Medium | When necessary | Infrequent |
action_history: Opening AKC website: const akcPage1 = await openTab('https://www.akc.org/');
Selecting first two breeds in AKC compare tool: await firstTop1.click();

Selecting first two breeds in AKC compare tool: await akcPage1.locator('.js-breed-comparison-row-top .breed-comparison-row').nth(0).locator('.breed-comparison-select-breeds__option[data-title="Afghan Hound"]').click();
Selecting first two breeds in AKC compare tool: await secondTop1.click();

Selecting first two breeds in AKC compare tool: await akcPage1.locator('.js-breed-comparison-row-top .breed-comparison-row').nth(1).locator('.breed-comparison-select-breeds__option[data-title="Akita"]').click();
Opening AKC compare URL with breeds preselected: const akcPage2 = await openTab('https://www.akc.org/compare-breeds/?breed1=afghan-hound&breed2=akita&breed3=azawakh');
Finding Azawakh breed ID and opening tools comparison: const akcPage3 = await openTab(compUrlTools1);
Selecting breeds through AKC dropdowns: await akcPage1.locator('.breed-comparison-select__top').first().click();
Selecting breeds through AKC dropdowns: await akcPage1.locator('.breed-comparison-select-breeds__option[data-title="Afghan Hound"]').first().click();
Using page script to select all three breeds: if (top) top.click();
Using page script to select all three breeds: opt.click();
Opening comparison results from selected breeds: await akcPage1.locator('e24').click();
